name: The Fairway Room
about: The Fairway Room is a unique Bar and Grill and entertainment space designed for both golf enthusiasts and social gatherers. It was created by a local father and son duo to bring the experience of a championship course indoors. The venue offers state-of-the-art golf simulators, allowing players to perfect their swings year-round, in addition to a full bar and grill serving craft cocktails and great food. The atmosphere is tailored for everyone, from beginners to seasoned golfers, providing a dedicated space to enjoy the game regardless of skill level.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 2,000 golf courses, including local favorites, for year-round play
A combination of a championship golf simulator experience with a full bar and grill
An atmosphere designed for all skill levels, from beginners to pros

food_and_drink.notes: Great food available, including options for social gatherings
Full bar serving craft cocktails and beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether you need to bring your own clubs or if rentals are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers great food and craft cocktails, but it does not mention if outside food and drinks are allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on the average time it takes to play 18 holes on the simulators.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Fairway Room is designed for everyone, including families, and offers a welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all skill levels.
